abilities.description: Templar Assassin becomes highly elusive, avoiding damage and gaining a bonus to her damage. The damage and avoidance effects are separate, and have a limited number of instances.
abilities.name: Refraction
abilities.story: Manipulating her psionic veil, Lanaya bends nature's law to her will.

abilities.description: Templar Assassin conceals herself, becoming invisible as long as she remains still. If Meld's invisibility is broken by attacking an enemy, Lanaya will deal bonus damage to the enemy and reduce their armor for 12 seconds.
abilities.name: Meld
abilities.story: Lanaya is as elusive as her covenant with the Hidden Temple.

abilities.description: Templar Assassin's psi blades slice through the attacked unit, splitting and damaging enemy units directly behind it, while gaining bonus attack range. For each unit it damages, the spill damage is reduced by a percentage.
abilities.name: Psi Blades
abilities.story: Her blades pierce the skin as much as the mind, furthering her understanding of the mystery that is reality.

abilities.description: Springs the nearest trap, slowing nearby enemies.
abilities.name: Trap

abilities.description: Allows Templar Assassin to teleport to any Psionic Trap after channeling for 1.5 seconds, detonating it upon arrival. Channeling Psionic Projection does not break Meld.
abilities.name: Psionic Projection
abilities.story: In reward for her service, Lanaya has been granted access to secrets that unlock new techniques for her psionic gifts.

abilities.description: Templar Assassin places mystical traps that invisibly monitor enemy movement. When sprung at her command, they exert a slowing influence of 30% in the area. Traps charge up to slow 60% after 3.5 seconds. Deals bonus damage when fully charged.
abilities.name: Psionic Trap
abilities.story: Calling upon the reach of the Hidden Temple, none escape the eye of the Templar.

abilities.description: Springs the trap, slowing nearby enemies.
abilities.name: Trap

description: Slows down enemies with traps. Bending the laws of nature itself, Lanaya forms a Refraction field that absorbs incoming blows, yet amplifies outgoing attacks. She Melds into the background, lying in ambush to unleash a burst of psionic energy on unsuspecting targets. Violet light emanates from her fingertips, her Psi Blades out-ranges any melee weapon, shreds and pierce through lines of foes at once. Persistent in her goals, Lanaya marks the ground with magic circles of eldritch design. Those who walk unknowingly over a Psionic Trap can only limp away from the explosion — for their presence has been revealed, and the assassin who Projected herself into place is not far behind.  Carry Escape  Female, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: In DotA, Templar Assassin makes numerous references to the game "Starcraft", another famous RTS game by "Blizzard". Her ability to manipulate psionic energy, the Psi Blades she wields, and the mention of her master being originally from Aiur in her DotA biography all apply to the Protoss, one of the three main races of the game. The description of Meld also describes it as the "Art of Shakuras". In "Starcraft" lore Shakuras is the capital of the Lenassa clan which is part of the Nerazim faction better known as Dark Templar. Lenassa templars are wearing cloth shrouds on their faces, and have purple warp blades and purple eyes.[1]

hero_talents.talent_right: Refraction Can Be Cast While Disabled
hero_talents.talent_left: +120 Psi Blades Attack and Spill Range
